mapper.sql: c.id, c.name, c.code, c.teacher_id, c.description, c.credit, c.hours, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time, t.name as teacher_name
mapper.select: select from course c left join teacher t on c.teacher_id = t.id where c.id = #{id}
select from course c left join teacher t on c.teacher_id = t.id order by c.create_time desc
select from course c left join teacher t on c.teacher_id = t.id where c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} order by c.create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into course(name, code, teacher_id, description, credit, hours, status) values(#{name}, #{code}, #{teacherId}, #{description}, #{credit}, #{hours}, #{status})
mapper.delete:
delete from course where id in
#{id}
